intent.title: Investigate elevated p99 latency in checkout-service
intent.description: Error rate and latency rose after deploy v184

findings.summary: p99 latency doubled after deploy v184; DB errors correlate with spike
deploy v184 introduced new DB pool settings 6 minutes before spike

proposal.title: Rollback checkout-service from v184 to v183
proposal.rationale: Independent telemetry and deploy findings agree that v184 caused the regression
